blocks.content: While Shirone was lost in thought, the mafia group was having a secret conversation.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: What are we going to do? Stick to the plan?

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: I feel a bit bad. We got a lot from the settlement. Do we really need to go this far?

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: We have no choice. It's the East Country. Someone stirred up the forum, and public opinion turned against us.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: Expressing their intent to settle through the news was effective, but the problem was the West Country's exclusive forum.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: People who disapproved of helping an East Country user began to slander the mafia group.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: There were even rumors that they were spies for the East Country, and some even called for their assassination.
Having reached this conclusion, the mafia group looked back at Shirone, who was deep in thought.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: How about turning off Donatello? It consumes quite a bit of power.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ah, right.
Yahweh2's power was at 16%.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I"ll need to use a backup charger to get back.
As Shirone prepared to leave, the mafia group closely observed Yahweh2's movements.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: Did he turn it off?

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: I can't tell. There's no sign at all.
Since he handled Donatello so skillfully, there was no way to confirm it from the outside.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: Let's just do it. On three, we shoot.
Timing their actions through communication, they all aimed their weapons at Yahweh2's head.
Gunshots
Shirone, who had already leaped, rolled quickly on the white sand and knelt on one knee.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: Did you keep Donatello on?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They wanted to check if I was safe.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A victory pose?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The only way to communicate with me when direct communication was impossible.
There were likely things happening outside that Shirone wasn't aware of.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What could it be?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A traitor in the West Country. News, or the forum…
It was a conclusion that came easily with a bit of thought.

blocks.speaker: Dex Sensibility
blocks.content: Judging by your reaction, no explanation is needed. Still, thanks for the clean settlement. So, can you just die? We won't touch your loot.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If you want to kill me, go ahead.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Mutual trust lasts only until the transaction is complete. We've settled, so now we're just enemies.
Activating Michelangelo, Shirone smiled.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's start, High Gear.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: He's not a bad guy.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: Even if the conditions were unfavorable to him, he clearly distinguished right from wrong.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: He makes people feel ashamed. He must be even more impressive in reality. But because of that…
The mafia group aimed their guns again.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: I won't feel guilty.
Firepower exceeding level 200 rained down
Yahweh2 jumped through space in an instant.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: Damn! That technique…!
The impact was different from what they saw in the video.
The white sand beach of Moon Island was filled with smoke and haze, and gunfire continued incessantly.
Boom!
The power equivalent to a missile destroyed the machine, and the remaining six increased their output even more.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Phew. The 150-level difference is tough.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If it were a boss creature, he could read the pattern, but users' patterns were in the realm of quantum mechanics.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The gap was so large that it couldn't be bridged without the senses of a bat or temporal explosion.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: What is this?

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: He dodged most bullets, and even when they tried to suppress him with output, he jumped through space.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: Damn it! Having 15 more selective options isn't even an advantage.
Meanwhile, the counterattacks continued, and another comrade fell.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: Hey! Let's use grenades too! How can we win when he keeps firing unlimited attacks?

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: Wait. There's one chance. It's not unlimited. The power limit is inevitable. We'll catch him when he tries to use the backup charger.
The battle continued, and two more comrades died.

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: Hey! What are we going to do?

blocks.speaker: Mafia Group
blocks.content: Wait.
The mafia was just as anxious, but from now on, it was a test of patience.
A red signal appeared in Shirone's augmented reality.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Remaining power: 2%.
Knowing what the enemies were aiming for, he held out as long as possible, but he couldn't delay any longer.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Damn!
Throwing a flashbang to cause an explosion, Shirone moved behind a rock and took out the backup charger.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Now!
The mafia, Dex Sensibility, and Sona's machines all opened, and the equipped grenades were launched.
Homing communication.
The grenades, trailing smoke, flew towards Shirone's hiding spot and suddenly exploded.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh?
At the same time, Shirone, who had equipped the backup charger, emerged from behind the rock.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Good! Let's fight properly…!
As the smoke cleared, a slender machine was bent over in a sword-wielding stance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Operator?

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: R-really, the Operator.
Slowly straightening up and sheathing her sword, she looked at Shirone and spoke.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: We finally meet?
Though tense because the Operator was from the West Country, she dashed towards the mafia group.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Uh…
Crunch!
With a critical hit, his face was shattered, and Dex Sensibility and Sona were thrown to the sides.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What the heck? Why is she attacking us?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Who knows? Maybe it's an assassination order. Just run!
The Operator, who had been watching them leisurely, drew her sword again.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Collapse.
As the sword struck the sand, a spherical magnetic field began pulling the machines towards it.
Aaah!
Though only a meter in diameter, Dex Sensibility and Sona were dragged at terrifying speed and collided.
Boom!
The impact was so strong that their limbs were torn off, leaving Shirone chilled to the bone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's like a black hole.

blocks.speaker: Dex Sensibility
blocks.content: Why… why are you…

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I'll end it here. I won't assassinate you, but don't betray the West Country again. You can post it on the forum if you want.
Hearing this, Dex Sensibility fell silent, and the deceased also disappeared quietly.
With only their loot left behind, the Operator turned to Shirone.
With a pop, she vanished.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Behind!
Following Donatello's detected position, Shirone quickly turned to find the Operator's face suddenly close.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She's incredibly fast.
This was the speed of the top-ranked player.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's go somewhere quiet.
Without waiting for a reply, the Operator lifted Shirone's machine effortlessly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was his first time being held like this by a woman, and it felt quite strange.
As he looked up at her beautiful face from her embrace, he momentarily lost himself.
Boom!
With immense power, she launched herself into the sky like a rocket.
In one leap, she landed on the highest cliff of Moon Island and set Shirone down.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I saw the news.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Oh, don't worry too much. I had some misconceptions too. You and I…
The Operator pointed to the ground.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Apologize to me directly.
Whoosh, the wind blew.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She's definitely unique.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm sorry for my harsh words back then. After playing High Gear myself, I understand what you meant.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I'm sorry too. For underestimating you.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No problem.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I knew about you. Arian Shirone. Graduate of Alpheas Magic School. Called Yahweh of this era.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone flinched in surprise.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Could you be someone I know…

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: No. This is our first meeting. But I've seen you in dreams. You appear in many people's dreams. Michelangelo was created based on that image.
The Operator looked at the moon.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Creating a world requires a lot of inspiration. Since I don't go outside, I get most of my inspiration from people's dreams. Though I dislike dreamers, High Gear itself is illegal anyway.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why don't you want to go outside?

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Without bringing her into reality, exploring the apocalypse would be impossible.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I woke up every day to my parents fighting. Their hatred for each other was so intense that they didn't care about me at all. Or maybe that hatred was directed at me because having me defined them as a couple. I bought a separate house and set up a workshop. I could earn money using Under Coder.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone listened silently.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I hated reality so much that I needed a perfect world to escape to. That's when I started designing High Gear. Do you know what's most horrifying? No matter how long you live here, when you wake up, hardly any time has passed in reality. So I became more reluctant to go out and eventually became the top ranker.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I know there are far worse things happening in reality than what I'm going through. But do I have to suffer while caring about all that? Even if I should care, why don't my parents care about my suffering?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No one blames you. There's no such thing as deserving to suffer.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: The Operator seemed to appreciate Shirone's words and continued softly with her small mouth.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: The person who gave you a free pass in the West Country is probably Little Witch? Her true identity is likely Kashan's former empress.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: …Yes.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: If she could hack dreams, lying wouldn't work on her.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: A guild member was attacked in reality. It may seem simple but it's incredibly difficult to synchronize with the outside world from Under Coder.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: She must have used time magic.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: She probably knows my location too. Being ruthless, she might kill me.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Don't worry. She won't seek your consent through such means. As per our initial agreement.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Hmph, whatever. Let her do as she pleases. Ignoring it isn't because I'm scared. One minute in reality is almost 30 minutes here. If I'm injured outside, I might miss the Solar War.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You really love High Gear.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: For the first time, a smile appeared on the Operator's lips.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I was honestly happy when you praised my world. It felt comforting somehow. I'll give Michelangelo and Donatello to you. Do your best until the Solar War.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If I win, you'll help me?

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: That won't happen but…

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: The Operator slowly turned towards Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: If I win, will you live with me?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh?

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I'll give you everything you want to see, have, or do. I can create anything for you. You're struggling so much in reality. Let's travel beautiful places together and play High Gear too. Time here is slower than in reality. You don't have to worry about others' opinions. Don't you want to take a break from everything for a while?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The reason he couldn't outright refuse was because what she said was true.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Sorry. Your world is beautiful but it doesn't feel real to me. My heart belongs in reality.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: …I see.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: She accepted it without resistance.
She slowly approached him, and tilted her head.
She kissed him on the lips.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: After a brief kiss and stepping back, Shirone looked at her questioningly with his eyes.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: It's a reward for your praise. Everyone enjoys themselves freely in High Gear but I've never done this for anyone else before. Think of it as respect from this fake world to you.
Leaping high into the air while looking down at Shirone, she disappeared into the moon halo.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: See you at the Solar War.
